steps.title: Clarify the missing time
steps.content: The first sentence describes a gap in the rock record. The next sentence clarifies that time still passed and that sediment was likely removed by erosion and weathering.

steps.title: Use an obvious clarification
steps.content: "Of course" fits because the second sentence states an obvious clarification about the gap. A introduces a specific example, B signals contradiction, and D signals result, none of which matches the relationship. The answer is C.
